tooltip.diggerhelmet.cooldown: Automatically drinks water from inventory when installed in Digger Helmet
tooltip.diggerhelmet.digger_helmet.shift: Take the helmet in hand, press §eSHIFT§7+right click to open helmet interface
tooltip.diggerhelmet.digger_helmet.toolt: Ouch! Got burned, better not touch the candle
tooltip.diggerhelmet.eternal_candle.more: You may need to kill more zombies, the drop chance of eternal candle from hand is not 100%. Good luck!
tooltip.diggerhelmet.eternal_candle.shif: Obtained from Candle Slime or Zombie (spawns with candle in hand)
tooltip.diggerhelmet.silk_lining.usage: Install in Digger Helmet for cooling properties
tooltip.diggerhelmet.wool_lining.usage: Install in Digger Helmet for temperature properties
